title: SPIE SA announces the publication of its 2025 Universal Registration Document including the 2025 Annual Financial Report
description: Cergy-Pontoise, April 3rd, 2026 - SPIE SA announces the publication of its 2025 Universal Registration Document, including the Annual Financial Report for the 2025 fiscal year, registered by the French securities regulator, the Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF) on April 2nd, 2026 under the number D.26-0216.

title: SPIE SA : mise à disposition du Document d’Enregistrement  Universel 2025 incluant le Rapport financier annuel 2025
description: Cergy-Pontoise, le 3 avril 2026 – SPIE SA annonce la publication de son Document d’Enregistrement Universel 2025, contenant le rapport financier annuel pour l’exercice clos le 31 décembre 2025, qui a été enregistré auprès de l’Autorité des Marchés Financiers (AMF) le 2 avril 2026, sous le numéro D.26-0216.

title: naoo AG Confirms Successful Full-Platform Rollout of Generation V Across iOS and Android
description: naoo AG confirms the successful rollout of Generation V across iOS and Android, marking the transition into full commercial scaling operations.

title: naoo AG bestätigt erfolgreichen Rollout der Generation V auf iOS und Android
description: naoo AG bestätigt den erfolgreichen Rollout von Generation V auf iOS und Android und markiert damit den Übergang in den kommerziellen Skalierungsbetrieb.

title: Enjoy a Fashion Spectacle Inspired by “One Car Two Vibes” at the Launch of the C5 SHS-H
description: Omoda & Jaecoo Vietnam launched the C5 SHS-H with a fashion show themed “One Car Two Vibes.” The runway used blue and red to symbolize gentle and dynamic

title: Tận hưởng bữa tiệc thời trang với chủ đề “One Car Two Vibes – Song hành phong cách” tại lễ ra mắt C5 SHS-H
description: VU HỒ, Trung Quốc, April 03, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Vừa qua, mẫu xe Omoda C5 SHS-H đã được ra mắt theo một cách khác biệt. Mẫu xe xuất hiện trong một không gian được dàn dựng như sàn runway, nơi ánh sáng, âm nhạc và chuyển động cùng hội tụ để kể một câu chuyện: câu chuyện về phong cách sống của thế hệ mới – nơi công nghệ và cá tính song hành.

title: Ipsen announces that Beech Tree has obtained an exemption from the obligation to submit a public tender offer
description: PARIS, FRANCE, 3 April 2026 — Ipsen (Euronext: IPN; ADR: IPSEY) announces that Beech Tree — which directly and indirectly holds 26.03% of Ipsen S.A.’s share capital and 33.05% of its voting rights — has obtained from the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des marchés financiers) an exemption from the obligation to file a public tender offer for all Ipsen S.A. shares.1

title: Ipsen annonce l’obtention par Beech Tree d’une dérogation à l’obligation de déposer une offre publique
description:
PARIS, FRANCE, 3 AVRIL 2026 - Ipsen (Euronext: IPN; ADR: IPSEY) annonce que Beech Tree - qui détient directement et indirectement 26,03 % du capital et 33,05 % des droits de vote d'Ipsen S.A. - a obtenu de l’Autorité des marchés financiers une dérogation la dispensant de déposer un projet d'offre publique visant l'intégralité des actions Ipsen S.A1. 


Cette décision s’inscrit dans le cadre du transfert de la participation de Monsieur Henri Beaufour

title: OwlTing Group (NASDAQ: OWLS) Receives US$10 Million Investment with up to US$50 Million in Total Funding Available Upon Mutual Consent
description: OwlTing Group (NASDAQ: OWLS) secures US$10M convertible investment with facility for up to US$50M in total funding to expand OwlPay globally.
